title: IT Support Specialist
description: Provide technical support for hardware, software, and network issues. Manage Windows/Linux OS, basic networking, and ticketing systems. Skills: Windows, Linux, troubleshooting, customer service, basic networking, Active Directory.

title: Junior Web Developer
description: Build responsive websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Basic knowledge of React or Vue. Version control with Git. Skills: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Git, responsive design.

title: Junior Software Engineer
description: Develop and maintain web applications using Python and Django. Write unit tests, participate in code reviews. Skills: Python, Django, SQL, Git, problem-solving.

title: QA Tester
description: Manual and automated testing of web/mobile apps. Write test cases, use JIRA for bug tracking. Basic scripting with Python or JavaScript. Skills: manual testing, JIRA, Python, Selenium, attention to detail.

title: System Administrator
description: Manage Linux and Windows servers, automate tasks with bash/Python, monitor system health, manage backups. Skills: Linux, Windows Server, bash, Python, monitoring, backup/recovery.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Build responsive web interfaces using React, Redux, and modern CSS. Collaborate with backend teams. Skills: React, Redux, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, REST APIs, Git.

title: Backend Developer
description: Design and implement RESTful APIs using Node.js, Express, and PostgreSQL. Optimize database queries. Skills: Node.js, Express, SQL, PostgreSQL, REST API design, Git.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: End-to-end development using React, Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS. Deploy and maintain applications. Skills: React, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Git.

title: Software Engineer
description: Full-stack development with Python, Django, and PostgreSQL. Implement CI/CD pipelines. Skills: Python, Django, PostgreSQL, Docker, Jenkins, Git.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze data using SQL, Python (Pandas, NumPy), create dashboards in Power BI or Tableau. Present insights to stakeholders. Skills: SQL, Python, Pandas, Power BI, Tableau, statistics.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build ETL pipelines using Spark, Kafka, and AWS Glue. Manage data warehouses (Redshift, BigQuery). Skills: Python, SQL, Spark, Kafka, AWS, data modeling.

title: Data Scientist
description: Develop machine learning models with scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or PyTorch. Perform feature engineering, model evaluation, and deployment. Skills: Python, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, SQL, statistics, data visualization.

title: Cloud Engineer
description: Design and manage AWS infrastructure using Terraform, CloudFormation. Implement CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins. Skills: AWS, Terraform, Jenkins, Docker, Linux, Python.

title: Senior Cloud Engineer
description: Lead cloud architecture, multi-cloud (AWS, Azure, GCP), Kubernetes orchestration, infrastructure as code, cost optimization. Skills: AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, Terraform, Python, Go, leadership.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, manage Kubernetes clusters, monitoring with Prometheus/Grafana, scripting in Bash/Python. Skills: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Prometheus, Bash, Python, AWS.

title: Senior DevOps Engineer
description: Lead DevOps transformation, implement GitOps with ArgoCD, manage multi-cluster Kubernetes, SRE practices. Skills: Kubernetes, ArgoCD, Terraform, AWS, Python, Go, incident management.

title: Mobile Developer (iOS)
description: Develop native iOS apps using Swift and SwiftUI. Integrate REST APIs and Firebase. Skills: Swift, SwiftUI, REST APIs, Git, iOS design patterns.

title: Mobile Developer (Android)
description: Build Android apps using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Work with Firebase, Room database. Skills: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Firebase, REST APIs, Git.

title: Senior Mobile Developer
description: Lead mobile development, architecture decisions, cross-platform (Flutter/React Native), mentor juniors. Skills: Flutter, React Native, Swift, Kotlin, CI/CD for mobile, leadership.

title: QA Engineer (Automation)
description: Automated testing using Selenium WebDriver, PyTest, and Cypress. Integrate tests into CI/CD pipelines. Skills: Python, Selenium, Cypress, Jenkins, test frameworks.

title: Senior QA Engineer
description: Define QA strategy, lead automation framework development, performance testing with JMeter. Skills: automation frameworks, JMeter, CI/CD, team leadership, Python, Java.

title: Network Engineer
description: Configure and manage Cisco routers/switches, firewalls, VPN, and network monitoring tools. Skills: Cisco, routing, switching, firewalls, VPN, network security.

title: Senior Network Engineer
description: Design and implement complex network solutions, SD-WAN, network automation with Python/Ansible. Skills: Cisco, SD-WAN, Python, Ansible, network security, leadership.

title: Security Analyst
description: Monitor security events, conduct vulnerability assessments, use SIEM tools (Splunk, QRadar). Skills: SIEM, vulnerability assessment, incident response, networking, Linux.

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description: Implement security controls, penetration testing, OWASP top 10, firewalls, IDS/IPS. Skills: penetration testing, OWASP, firewalls, IDS/IPS, Python, Kali Linux.

title: Senior Cybersecurity Engineer
description: Lead security architecture, red team exercises, compliance (ISO 27001, GDPR), security automation. Skills: security architecture, red teaming, ISO 27001, Python, cloud security.

title: Database Administrator
description: Manage MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB databases. Performance tuning, backup/recovery, query optimization. Skills: SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, database tuning, backup.

title: Senior Database Administrator
description: Lead database strategy, high availability, replication, data warehousing, automation with Python. Skills: high availability, replication, data warehousing, Python, cloud databases.

title: Technical Project Manager
description: Agile project management, JIRA/Confluence, stakeholder communication, risk management. Technical background required. Skills: Agile, Scrum, JIRA, risk management, communication, leadership.

title: Product Manager
description: Define product roadmap, gather requirements, work with engineering teams, market analysis. Skills: product management, market research, user stories, data analysis, communication.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Lead technical design, microservices architecture, mentor juniors, code reviews. Tech stack: Python, Go, Docker, Kubernetes. Skills: microservices, Docker, Kubernetes, Python, Go, leadership.

title: Lead Software Engineer
description: Lead multiple teams, system architecture, technical strategy, hiring, and performance reviews. Skills: architecture, team leadership, system design, cloud, agile at scale.

title: Engineering Manager
description: Manage engineering teams, project delivery, career development, cross-team collaboration. Skills: people management, project delivery, agile, technical background, budgeting.

title: IT Consultant
description: Advise clients on IT strategy, digital transformation, system selection, and implementation. Skills: consulting, business analysis, IT strategy, communication, problem-solving.

title: Senior IT Consultant
description: Lead large-scale transformation projects, manage client relationships, pre-sales support. Skills: project leadership, client management, solution architecture, business development.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Deploy ML models into production, build MLOps pipelines using Kubeflow, MLflow. Skills: Python, TensorFlow, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, AWS SageMaker.

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Develop dashboards in Power BI/Tableau, write complex SQL queries, work with stakeholders. Skills: SQL, Power BI, Tableau, data visualization, business communication.

title: Solutions Architect
description: Design end-to-end solutions on AWS/Azure, create architecture diagrams, guide implementation. Skills: cloud architecture, AWS, Azure, solution design, communication, presales.

title: Enterprise Architect
description: Define enterprise IT strategy, architecture frameworks (TOGAF), governance, technology roadmaps. Skills: TOGAF, enterprise architecture, governance, strategy, stakeholder management.

title: Site Reliability Engineer (SRE)
description: Ensure reliability, scalability, and performance of systems. Implement SLIs/SLOs, incident management, chaos engineering. Skills: Kubernetes, Prometheus, Python, Go, Linux, monitoring.

title: Blockchain Developer
description: Develop smart contracts using Solidity, build dApps on Ethereum, integrate with web3.js. Skills: Solidity, Ethereum, web3.js, JavaScript, cryptography.

title: Game Developer
description: Develop games using Unity (C#) or Unreal Engine (C++). Implement game mechanics, physics, AI. Skills: Unity, C#, Unreal Engine, C++, game physics, 3D math.

title: Senior Game Developer
description: Lead game architecture, optimize performance, mentor juniors, collaborate with designers. Skills: Unity, Unreal Engine, C++, optimization, team leadership.

title: IT Risk Manager
description: Identify and manage IT risks, ensure compliance with regulations, conduct risk assessments. Skills: risk management, compliance, ISO 31000, audit, communication.

title: Scrum Master
description: Facilitate agile ceremonies, remove impediments, coach teams on Scrum practices. Skills: Scrum, agile coaching, JIRA, conflict resolution, communication.

title: Release Manager
description: Coordinate software releases, manage release calendars, automate deployment pipelines. Skills: CI/CD, Jenkins, Git, release coordination, change management.

title: Technical Writer
description: Write documentation for APIs, user guides, and developer portals. Use markdown, Sphinx, or similar. Skills: technical writing, markdown, API documentation, communication.

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Design user interfaces, wireframes, prototypes using Figma, Sketch. Conduct user research. Skills: Figma, UI design, user research, prototyping, HTML/CSS basics.

title: Senior UX Designer
description: Lead UX strategy, conduct usability testing, create design systems, mentor juniors. Skills: UX strategy, design systems, usability testing, Figma, user research.
